channel.title: Bladesinger on Zuluhotel Omega
channel.description: Recent content in Bladesinger on Zuluhotel Omega
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2025 Zuluhotel Omega. All Rights Reserved.

item.title: Bladesinger
item.description:
Skills

  • Anatomy
  • Enticement
  • Fencing
  • Musicianship
  • Peacemaking
  • Provocation
  • Swordsmanship
  • Tactics

Bonuses

  • Bonuses in all their specialized skills.
  • Can use the Songbook, and circle 1 mage spells.

Penalties

  • Unable to use Grark’s Walking Stick or Cloak of the Lettenhove.

item.title: Anatomy
item.description:
Using anatomy on a player or npc will determine their physical strength, agility and stamina.

If your anatomy skill is higher than 75 it will show the percentage of stamina the target has left with the message:

“This being is at xxx% of his max vigor.”

Anatomy will also increase your damage with melee weapons and the amount healed with bandages.

Strength

Strength Message
0-15 like they would have trouble lifting small objects.
16 - 30 Rather Feeble.
31 - 45 Somewhat weak.
46 - 60 To be of normal strength.
61 - 75 Somewhat strong.
76 - 90 Very strong.
91 - 105 Extremely strong.
106 - 120 Extraordinarily strong.
121 - 135 Strong as an ox.
136 - 150 One of the strongest people you have ever seen.
151 or higher Superhumanly strong.

Dexterity

Dexterity Message
0 - 15 like they barely manage to stay standing.
16 - 30 Very clumsy.
31 - 45 Somewhat uncoordinated.
46 - 60 Moderately dextrous.
61 - 75 Somewhat agile.
76 - 90 Very agile.
91 - 105 Extremely agile.
106 - 120 Extraordinarily agile.
121 - 135 Moves like quicksilver.
136 - 150 One of the fastest people you have ever seen.
151 or higher Superhumanly agile.

item.title: Enticement
item.description:
This ability requires Musicianship. Use of the skill will cause a target creature to reduce to its passive walking speed and move toward the player.

Any creature can be targeted except the following:

  • Players.
  • Guards that have been recently called.
  • NPCs marked “(Invulnerable)”.

This skill is considered non-aggressive and does not affect notoriety.

Using the Skill

When used, this skill will present the player with a targeting cursor. The player then selects a target. If successfully enticed, the target creature will reduce to its normal walking speed and walk toward the player. After attempting to entice a creature, the player must wait 10 seconds before using another skill.

item.title: Fencing
item.description:
Fencing will increase the damage and hit chance of fencing weapons.

Weapon Damage (x dices with x sides + fixed damage) Speed (Higher is faster) Hit type Blocks casting if equipped
Dagger 3d3 50 Normal Yes
Kryss 2d4+3 65 Normal Yes
Kryss of the Poison Element 2d4+18 98 Poisonhit lvl 3 No
Lance of Lothian 2d10+36 54 Banish hit No
Mystical Dagger 3d3 50 Normal No
Mystical Kryss 2d4+3 65 Normal No
Mystical Pitchfork 5d4 30 Normal No
Mystical Short Spear 3d6+3 40 Normal No
Mystical Skinning Knife 1d8 50 Normal No
Mystical Spear 1d20+1 35 Normal No
Mystical War Fork 4d6 35 Normal No
Pitchfork 5d4 30 Normal Yes
Pitchfork of the Shadow Element 5d4+25 45 Normal No
Scalpel of Trevize 1d8+21 75 Piercing hit No
Short Spear 3d6+3 40 Normal Yes
Skinning Knife 1d8 50 Normal Yes
Spear 1d20+1 35 Normal Yes
Spear of Renah 3d6+38 60 Spell hit: Spell: Meteor Swarm Chance of effect: 50% Circle: 7 No
Stygian Dagger 3d3 75 Normal No
Stygian Kryss 2d4+3 98 Normal No
Stygian Pitchfork 5d4 45 Normal No
Stygian Short Spear 3d6+3 60 Normal No
Stygian Skinning Knife 1d8 75 Normal No
Stygian Spear 1d20+1 54 Normal No
Stygian War Fork 4d6 53 Normal No
Swift Dagger 3d3 75 Normal Yes
Swift Kryss 2d4+3 98 Normal Yes
Swift Pitchfork 5d4 45 Normal Yes
Swift Short Spear 3d6+3 60 Normal Yes
Swift Skinning Knife 1d8 75 Normal Yes
Swift Spear 1d20+1 54 Normal Yes
Swift War Fork 4d6 53 Normal Yes
War Fork 4d6 35 Normal Yes
War Fork of the Water Element 4d6+25 53 Normal No

item.title: Musicianship
item.description:
When you double-click on a musical instrument, a music sample will play if you succeed and an ugly noise will occur if you fail.

When playing a musical instrument and standing still you will regain some of your stamina, the amount you regain will be higher the higher skill and specialized bard class you are.

This skill is also checked automatically each time you try to use one of the three specialized bard skills (discordance, peacemaking or provocation).

item.title: Peacemaking
item.description:
To use peacemaking you will need to have an instrument in your backpack.

Peacemaking checks both peacemaking skill and musicianship skill to see if you succeed.

If your target is a player it will check the players intelligence for difficulty up to a max of 150 difficulty.

If you manage to successfully peacemake a npc it will turn of war mode.

Range will increase with skill and specialization in bard class.

item.title: Provocation
item.description:
To use provocation you will need to have an instrument in your backpack.

Provocation check both provocation skill and musicianship skill to see if you succeed.

Provocation is used to provoke one npc on to another npc/player, if successful the npc will start attacking the targeted npc/player

Success chance will increase with skill and specialization in bard class.

Npcs Skill required

a Rabbit 5
Bird 5
a Gorilla 5

item.title: Swordsmanship
item.description:
Swordsmanship will increase the damage and hit chance with bladed weapons.

Weapon Damage (x dices with x sides + fixed damage) Speed (Higher is faster) Hit type Blocks casting if equipped
Axe 4d7 33 Normal Yes
Axe of Anias 3d5+35 50 Spell hit: Spell: Explosion Chance of effect: 50% Circle 5 No
Balthazaar’s Chilling Scimitar 2d7+20 71 Spell hit: Spell: Ice Strike Chance of effect: 50% Circle: 10 No
Bardiche 5d6+3 22 Normal Yes
Bardiche of Lynx 5d6+38 33 Random slayer type each hit (Not human slayer) No
Battle Axe 3d6 38 Normal Yes
Broadsword 1d18+1 45 Normal Yes
Butcher Knife 2d4 45 Normal Yes
Cleaver 2d4+1 40 Normal Yes
Cutlass 2d7+2 45 Normal Yes
Double Axe 3d6+4 35 Normal Yes
Enchanted Sword of Zulu 1d23+35 38 Spell hit: Spell: Random(5 kinds) Chance of effect: 50% Circle: 5 No
Executioner’s Axe 3d5 33 Normal Yes
Halberd 5d6+5 15 Normal Yes
Halberd of Alcatraz 5d6+60 8 Normal No
Hatchet 1d8+1 40 Normal Yes
Katana 1d16 58 Normal Yes
Katana of Kieri 2d8+35 87 Normal No
Katana of the Fire Element 1d16+25 87 Spell hit: Spell: Fireball Chance of effect: 30% Circle: 5 No

Longsword 3d5+2 45 Normal Yes
Mystical Axe 4d7 33 Normal No

item.title: Tactics
item.description: Higher tactics will increase your chance to hit with melee weapons.
